hero.title: What I notice, living it.
hero.subtitle: Notes on what I notice and the questions that stay.
home.heroMicro: Updated when there is something worth saying.
home.authorIntro: I work with data and design by day. The rest of the time, I pay attention to what goes on under the surface — in people, in patterns, in the things we take for granted. This is where I write about it.
writing.title: Writing
writing.description: On what I notice, what I remember, and what won't leave me alone.
themes.title: Threads
themes.description: Short thoughts, reading notes, and daily observations.
about.bio1: I live in Australia, and I work with data and design. That's the day job. But what I keep coming back to is the other side of things — what goes on beneath decisions, beneath patterns, beneath the stories we tell ourselves without noticing.
about.bio2: I'm drawn to the kind of thinking that doesn't announce itself — the questions that sit quietly and keep their shape. The ones that interest me most have no clean answers: how we become more ourselves, how we find what matters, how we live with what we can't resolve.
about.whatIWriteBody: This site is where I put things down. The writing is about what I notice — what's underneath the ordinary, what stays after the obvious falls away. If there's a thread, it's attention to what's actually happening.
about.quote: I'd rather be interested than interesting. And I'd like to write clearly enough that some of that interest comes through.
subscribe.title: If you'd like
subscribe.description: I write from time to time. You might want to see it.
subscribe.subscribed: Thank you. Check your email for a welcome note.
subscribe.error: That didn't work. Would you try again?
subscribe.confirmed: You're on the list now. Thank you for wanting to read along.
subscribe.unsubscribed: You've been removed from the list. No more emails.
subscribe.invalidToken: This link is no longer valid. You're welcome to subscribe again if you'd like.
subscribe.pageDescription: When there's something new, I'll send a short note. That's all.
share.title: Share this article
articleBottom.subscribeDescription: You're welcome to leave your email. I'll write when there's something to share.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you'd like to talk, or if something here resonated, I'd be glad to hear from you.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Sent. I'll write back before long.
contact.error: That didn't go through. Would you try again?
contact.responseTime: I usually reply within a few days.
support.title: Support This Writing
support.description: This site has no ads, no sponsors, and no paywalls. If the writing has meant something to you and you'd like to help it continue, I'm grateful.
support.whyBody: Everything here is written and maintained by one person. Your support covers hosting and the time it takes to think and write carefully. That's all it goes toward.
support.internationalDescription: Support via Stripe — credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay accepted.
support.chinaDescription: Scan the QR code to support via Alipay.
support.thankYouBody: Thank you. It means more than I can say easily.
about.connectDescription: If any of this resonates, there are a few ways to connect.
about.getInTouchDesc: I'd be glad to hear from you.
about.supportWorkDesc: If you'd like to help this site stay independent.
